findings.description: The signature block is duplicated: the handwritten signature image contains 'Sincerely,', 'Judith A. Wehner', and 'Assistant State Mining Specialist' as visible text within the image, and those same elements also appear as separate HTML text above and below the image, creating a reading-order disruption.
findings.evidence: PDF page 4 shows a single signature block with handwritten signature, printed name, and title. HTML renders 'Sincerely,' as text, then an image of the signature block (which itself contains 'Sincerely,', the name, and title), then repeats 'Judith A. Wehner' and 'Assistant State Mining Specialist' as separate text.
